content: The orthographic variant spelling `reflexion` (the older, less common spelling of the concept of reflection) can be repurposed as a named architectural variant for LLM self-reflection mechanisms that explicitly incorporates the linguistic tension between older intuitive human reflection practices and modern formalized AI self-reflection. This new Reflexion framework for LLMs would draw on high school language pedagogy findings of how humans learn to structure deliberate reflective writing to add structured scaffolding to current unstructured LLM self-reflection pipelines.
